title: John Swinney's talk of US military ban at Prestwick is worst kind of political grandstanding

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Martyn McLaughlin has long documented the US military’s use of Prestwick Airport and is unimpressed by the First Minister’s latest pronouncement

sections.heading: Key details
